chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.D-48 of 2001 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 541/2018 2. For orders on M.A 542/2018 24.01.2018. Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G. for the appellant. Syed Tariq Ahmed Shah, Advocate for respondent No.1. None present for respondents No.2 and 3. Syed Meeral Shah learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh today has filed a statement stating that under the instructions of Prosecutor General Sindh he does not press this Criminal Acquittal Appeal. The statement is taken on record. In view of the above statement, this Criminal Acquittal Appeal stands dismissed as withdrawn. Listed applications are also stand disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
